# mdoc test vectors

- `minimal-deviceresponse.hex` — SYNTHETIC, generated by
  TestGenerateMinimalVector (buildMinimalDeviceResponse) in model_test.go.
  Structurally complete DeviceResponse; NOT cryptographically valid (placeholder
  issuerAuth/deviceSignature). Purpose: exercise the CBOR data model and give
  WP-08/WP-09 a known-shape decode fixture.

PENDING (phase-0 gate, SPECREFS.md): replace / augment with a real
DeviceResponse captured from the EUDI reference wallet and an ISO/IEC 18013-5
Annex D example, cross-checked byte-for-byte. Cryptographically valid vectors
are produced by the Issue/DevicePresent façade (T-03.9).
